# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Security updates are made on the `main` branch. Use the latest commit on `main`
when testing or reporting a problem.

## Report a vulnerability

Do not open a public issue for a security vulnerability. Use GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting form][private-report].

Include these details when possible:

- The affected version, command, API, or file
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- The security impact
- A possible fix or workaround

The maintainers will review the report and reply through the private advisory.
Please keep the report private until a fix is available.

[private-report]: https://github.com/ucsc-cse115a-alexandria/alexandria/security/advisories/new
